title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Adidas India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Adidas India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Adidas India! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Adidas India:
Adidas India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adidas India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
